markdown:
#  Can I create a change order for a contract or funding before a downstream collaborator responds to an RFQ for a change event? 
##  Answer 
Yes. If your project team is using the [Request for Quote (RFQ)](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) feature in the Change Events tool, you can create a [client contract change order](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), [funding change order](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), or [prime contract change order](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) before a [downstream collaborator](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) submits an RFQ response. Once the collaborator responds to the RFQ, a member of your project team must update the change order's [schedule of values](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) with the appropriate RFQ amounts.

title: Can I create a change order for a contract or funding before a downstream collaborator responds to an RFQ for a change event?
description: Describes how Procore works if you create a change order before a collaborator submits a response to an RFQ for a change event.
